name: DropboxSignConnector
description: Connects to the Dropbox Sign (formerly HelloSign) REST API (Signature Requests, Templates, Team, Account, Embedded signing, API Apps) using an API key. HTTP Basic auth — api_key as username, empty password.

install_fields.label: Dropbox Sign API Key
install_fields.placeholder: Paste your Dropbox Sign API key
install_fields.help: From Dropbox Sign → Settings → API → API Keys. The key is sent as the username in HTTP Basic auth (empty password).

install_fields.label: API App Client ID
install_fields.help: Required only for embedded signature requests. Create an API App in Dropbox Sign → Settings → API Apps.

install_fields.label: Default Test Mode
install_fields.help: Default test_mode for all signature requests — production should set to false.

install_fields.label: Dropbox Sign API Base URL
install_fields.help: Base URL for the Dropbox Sign REST API. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Maximum Dropbox Sign API requests per minute. Default is 60.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates the API key and probes /account to confirm the credential works.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Dropbox Sign API connectivity by hitting /account.

apis.name: Get Account
apis.description: GET /account — returns the authenticated account payload.

apis.name: List Signature Requests
apis.description: GET /signature_request/list — paginated list of signature requests, optionally filtered by query.

apis.name: Send Signature Request
apis.description: POST /signature_request/send — kick off a new signature request. Provide file_urls or files; signers is a list of {name,email_address} dicts.

apis.name: Cancel Signature Request
apis.description: POST /signature_request/cancel/{id} — cancel an in-flight signature request.

apis.name: Remind Signature Request
apis.description: POST /signature_request/remind/{id} — send a reminder email to the named signer.

apis.name: Download Files
apis.description: GET /signature_request/files/{id}?file_type=… — returns the signed PDF (or ZIP) bytes for a signature request.

apis.name: List Templates
apis.description: GET /template/list — paginated list of templates available to the authenticated account.

apis.name: Send With Template
apis.description: POST /signature_request/send_with_template — create a signature request from a template.

apis.name: List Team Members
apis.description: GET /team — list members of the authenticated user's team.

apis.name: Create Embedded Signature Request
apis.description: POST /signature_request/create_embedded — create an embedded signature request. Returns a sign URL renderable inside an iframe. Requires the API app client_id.

apis.name: Create API App
apis.description: POST /api_app — register a new API App (required for embedded signing).
